case_title: MOLLY FONG VS. VICTORIA KATZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY SERVED SEP-16-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, VICTORIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA HORIZON ENTERPRISE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KATZ, VICTORIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA HORIZON ENTERPRISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 324 BALBOA ST. S.F. CA. 94118, INCLUDING ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, VICTORIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA HORIZON ENTERPRISE DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PERJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY SERVED SEP-16-2002, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING POSTING AND MAILING OF UNLAWFUL DETAINER SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, VICTORIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA HORIZON ENTERPRISE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION RE; DAILY RENTAL VALUE; AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, VICTORIA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA HORIZON ENTERPRISE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
